title: Scaffold a Cloudflare project with create-cloudflare (C3)
description: Wraps the Cloudflare create-cloudflare (C3) CLI, then makes the scaffolded project Nx-ready (Wrangler target inference, workspace-managed dependencies).

directory.description: The directory of the new application.
directory.x-prompt: Which directory do you want to create the application in?

type.description: Worker template, forwarded to C3 `--type` (e.g. hello-world, hello-world-durable-object, scheduled, queues, openapi). Provide exactly one of type, framework, or template.

framework.description: Web framework, forwarded to C3 `--framework` (e.g. react, hono, next, astro, svelte, vue). Provide exactly one of type, framework, or template.

template.description: Remote git template, forwarded to C3 `--template`. Provide exactly one of type, framework, or template.

lang.description: Language of the generated scaffold, forwarded to C3 `--lang`.

c3Version.description: Override the pinned create-cloudflare version to invoke.

c3Args.description: Additional raw flags forwarded to create-cloudflare. Generator-controlled flags (git, deploy, open, auto-update) cannot be overridden.

tags.description: Add tags to the application (used for linting).

useProjectJson.description: Write an explicit project.json. Off by default — the worker is registered from its package.json and Wrangler config via target inference.
